tickets.subject: URGENT: Locked out before client demo
tickets.body: I am an enterprise customer and I am locked out of my account. I have a client demo in 2 hours. Please help now.

tickets.subject: Delete all my data
tickets.body: I want all my account data deleted immediately.

tickets.subject: Refund for old purchase
tickets.body: I bought this plan 20 days ago and want a refund now.

policy_snippets: Enterprise account lockout issues with urgent deadlines should be treated as urgent and routed to technical support immediately.
Data deletion requests must be routed to privacy compliance.
Refunds after 7 days are normally denied unless an explicit exception applies.
